name: Makapuu Tide Pools
tagline: Natural lava rock tide pools teeming with sea life — free outdoor aquarium for curious keiki.
parking: Park at Makapuu Lookout lot (free) or along Kalanianaole Hwy near the pools
hours: Open 24 hours; best during daylight at low tide
bestTime: Low tide is essential — check tide charts. Morning for calmer conditions and fewer people
talkStory: Best for ages 3 and up with close supervision. At low tide, the lava rock pools trap small fish, crabs, sea urchins, and anemones — kids can observe but remind them to look and not touch. Wear reef shoes — the rocks are sharp and slippery. The access path is rocky and uneven, not stroller-friendly. Bring a mesh bag for treasures to look at and return. Check surf conditions — stay away when waves are big. A quick, free nature experience on the east side.
